auth.magicLinkSentBody: We sent a login link to {email}
auth.magicLinkError: Could not send the link. Please try again.
auth.codeHint: Or enter the 6-digit code from the email:
auth.codeError: That code didn't work. Check it or request a new link.

googleErrors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
googleErrors.tokenExchangeFailed: Could not connect to Google. Please try again.
googleErrors.userinfoFailed: Could not retrieve your Google profile. Please try again.
googleErrors.noEmail: No email associated with this Google account.

assistant.title: Ask {brand}
assistant.intro: Hi! Ask me about the courses, downloads and sessions on this site.
assistant.error: Something went wrong — please try again.
assistant.disclosure: Conversations may be reviewed by {brand} to improve answers.
